palette: warm urban palette, muted olive tactical fabrics, tan webbing, charcoal shadows
subject: good faction rifleman
base_description: NATO-style military rifleman seen from above, realistic proportions, helmet, tactical vest, M4-style rifle, readable combat silhouette
silhouette: top-down military operator silhouette with a clearly readable rifle and vest profile

idle.description: combat ready idle using a single canonical south-facing source frame rotated at runtime

move.description: tactical jogging movement using canonical south-facing source frames rotated at runtime

notes: The head center is the canonical rotation pivot for the body sprite.
Small SVG geometry changes must preserve the head pivot exactly at the canvas center.
The current MVP stores only canonical south-facing source frames for the body animation set.
